summary: Frontend testing complete for Navigation UI Polish and State/Country Boundary Voice Prompts feature. All key features verified working: Guest login, Dashboard load, Navigation view with polished search bar, idle region indicator showing 'IOWA', arrival HUD with region bar (W BROADWAY + IOWA), navigation stats (Speed/Distance/Time/ETA), exit/reroute buttons, compass rose, weather overlay, and POI filtering.

minor.issue: 504 Gateway Timeout when fetching POIs - external API issue, not app bug

minor_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing sprite images: 'road_', 'construction_pattern', 'running', 'post_office', 'courthouse', 'car_wash' - cosmetic only
Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: State/Country boundary tracking via Nominatim reverse geocoding (lines 1941-1999 in NavigationView.tsx)
VERIFIED: Voice prompts trigger on state/country change via speak() function (lines 1983-1987)
VERIFIED: Idle region indicator pill shows city+state when not driving (data-testid='idle-region-indicator')
VERIFIED: Arrival HUD redesigned with region bar showing current road + state (data-testid='nav-arrival-hud', 'region-indicator')
VERIFIED: Navigation stats layout with Speed/Distance/Time/ETA (data-testid='nav-stat-speed', 'nav-stat-dist', 'nav-stat-duration', 'nav-stat-eta')
VERIFIED: Search bar polished with cleaner styling and placeholder 'Search address, city, or POI...'
VERIFIED: All data-testid attributes present: nav-search-container, nav-search-input, nav-search-button, start-route-button, compass-rose-container
VERIFIED: Exit and reroute buttons functional (data-testid='nav-exit-button', 'nav-reroute-button')
VERIFIED: Guest login flow works correctly - reaches dashboard after clicking 'Continue as Guest'
VERIFIED: IP geolocation fallback working - detected Council Bluffs, Iowa (41.2619, -95.8608)

features_tested.guest_login: PASS - Click 'Continue as Guest', reaches dashboard
features_tested.dashboard_loads: PASS - Command Center dashboard loads with ELD status, weather, stats
features_tested.navigation_view_loads: PASS - Map loads with user location marker visible
features_tested.search_bar_polish: PASS - Cleaner styling, placeholder 'Search address, city, or POI...'
features_tested.search_suggestions: PASS - HERE API suggestions appear (8 items including nearby POIs)
features_tested.route_calculation: PASS - Route to Chicago calculated (463.8 mi, 7h 37m)
features_tested.arrival_hud: PASS - Bottom HUD with region bar, stats, exit/reroute buttons
features_tested.region_indicator: PASS - Shows 'W BROADWAY. GO' + 'IOWA' with green dot
features_tested.idle_region_indicator: PASS - Shows 'IOWA' pill when not driving
features_tested.navigation_stats: PASS - Speed (0 MPH), Distance (463.8 MI), Time (7h 37m), ETA (12:58 PM)
features_tested.weather_overlay: PASS - Shows 57°F Clear, 5 MPH SE wind
features_tested.poi_filtering: PASS - Filter button visible, POI markers render on map
features_tested.along_route_pois: PASS - Panel shows nearby fuel stations (Phillips 66, Pilot Flying J, etc.)

state_boundary_voice_prompts.reverse_geocoding: PASS - Nominatim API fetches state/country from coordinates
state_boundary_voice_prompts.throttling: PASS - Only fetches every 20s or 3km movement
state_boundary_voice_prompts.voice_announcement: IMPLEMENTED - speak() called with 'Now entering {state}.' on state change
state_boundary_voice_prompts.note: Voice announcement cannot be fully tested in headless browser due to AudioContext restrictions

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://trucker-dashboard-3.preview.emergentagent.com. All navigation UI polish features verified working. State boundary detection uses Nominatim reverse geocoding API with 20s/3km throttling. Voice prompts implemented via speak() function in speechService.ts. Key data-testids: nav-arrival-hud, region-indicator, idle-region-indicator, nav-stat-speed, nav-stat-dist, nav-stat-duration, nav-stat-eta, nav-exit-button, nav-reroute-button, nav-search-container, nav-search-input, nav-search-button, compass-rose-container. IP geolocation fallback places user in Council Bluffs, Iowa.
